message:
refactor: extract startup warnings to dedicated module

Move the security warning logic from index.ts to a dedicated
startup-warnings.ts module for better separation of concerns.

Changes:
- startup-warnings.ts: Contains logStartupSecurityWarnings() and
  isLocalHost() helper with structured logging and hostIsLocal field
- index.ts: Import and call the new module, remove inline logic
- startup-warnings.test.ts: Tests for warning conditions

Benefits:
- Cleaner main entry point
- Independently testable warning logic
- Structured logging with host/port/hostIsLocal context
- Enhanced warning messages with more detail

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
